subtasks.description: Show the daily active seats trend for Adobe across November 2024. Return date and daily active seat count ordered by date.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.sql: SELECT cf.event_date, cf.daily_active_seats FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Adobe' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-11-30' ORDER BY cf.event_date ASC
